mapper.select: select count(*) as TOTAL, count(case when status = 'PENDING' then 1 end) as PENDING, count(case when status = 'APPROVED' then 1 end) as APPROVED, count(case when status = 'REJECTED' then 1 end) as REJECTED from checkout_request
select attendance_seq, req_check_out from checkout_request where checkout_seq = #{checkout_seq}
